purpose.title: Purpose
purpose.text: Processes Activity Statements from Interactive Brokers and calculates taxable income from stock sales and dividends for the purposes of the annual tax return under Bulgarian tax legislation.

method.title: Method
method.text: FIFO/Weighted average acquisition cost per financial instrument, with conversion to BGN using the Bulgarian National Bank (BNB) official exchange rate applicable on the date of each transaction.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.text: All processing is performed locally in your browser. No data is transmitted, stored, or accessed by the developer.

dialog.title: How the Application Works
dialog.intro: The Application processes IBKR Activity Statement (CSV) and Trade Confirmation (HTML) files. Only USD and EUR are supported. Financial instruments such as options, cryptocurrencies, and transactions in other currencies are not supported.
steps: Trade data is extracted from Trade Confirmation files, including quantity, price, commissions, and fees.
Open positions and instrument metadata are extracted from the Activity Statement CSV.
BUY transactions: position cost is accumulated as price plus commissions and fees, calculated both in the original currency and in BGN using the BNB exchange rate applicable on the trade date.
SELL transactions: proceeds are calculated as price minus commissions and fees, converted to BGN using the BNB exchange rate applicable on the settlement date.
The acquisition cost upon disposal is determined using the weighted average method across all purchases for the respective instrument.
Where no purchase data exists for the current tax year, prior-year data or IBKR CSV values are used and explicitly marked as approximate.
dialog.positions: Displays open positions as of 31 December together with calculated acquisition cost. Where current-year data is unavailable, prior-year values or IBKR-reported data are used.
dialog.summary: Transactions are classified as taxable (Appendix No. 5) or exempt (Appendix No. 13) under Bulgarian tax law, including ETFs traded on regulated EU markets. Tax is calculated at a flat rate of 10% on net taxable income after deduction of 10% statutory expenses, in accordance with applicable legislation.
dialog.disclaimer: The information provided is indicative and for informational purposes only. It does not constitute financial, legal, or tax advice. Users are responsible for verifying all results before submission to the National Revenue Agency (NRA).

disclaimer.text: All data is calculated automatically and may contain inaccuracies. The results are provided for informational purposes only and must be reviewed and validated by the User prior to submission to the Bulgarian National Revenue Agency (NRA).

sections.title: 1. General Provisions
paragraphs: These Terms of Use ("Terms") govern the relationship between the user ("User") and the developer of the software application "IBKR Tax Calculator" ("Application").
By accessing or using the Application, the User confirms that they have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms.

sections.title: 2. Scope of the Service
paragraphs: The Application is an informational and auxiliary software tool intended solely to assist in calculations related to personal tax obligations under Bulgarian tax legislation.
The competent authority on tax matters is the National Revenue Agency (NRA).
The Application:
list: does not provide tax, financial, or legal advice;
does not replace consultation with a licensed or qualified professional;
does not constitute an official or legally binding source of information.

sections.title: 3. Functionality and Data Processing
paragraphs: The Application operates entirely within the User's browser environment.
list: No data is transmitted to external servers
No data is stored by the developer
All processing is performed locally on the User's device

sections.title: 4. User Responsibility
paragraphs: The User bears full and exclusive responsibility for:
list: the accuracy, completeness, and legality of the data provided;
the verification and validation of all calculated results;
the use of such results in preparing and submitting tax declarations;

sections.title: 5. Disclaimer of Warranties
paragraphs: The Application is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis, without warranties of any kind, whether express or implied.
The developer makes no representations or guarantees regarding accuracy, completeness, reliability, or fitness for a particular purpose.

sections.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
paragraphs: To the maximum extent permitted by law, the developer shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, consequential, or special damages, including but not limited to financial losses, penalties, missed benefits, or incorrect tax filings arising from the use of the Application.

sections.title: 7. Personal Data
paragraphs: The Application does not collect, store, or process personal data. It does not use cookies or tracking technologies. All data remains on the User's device.
Accordingly, the developer does not act as a data controller or processor within the meaning of applicable data protection laws, including the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

sections.title: 8. Intellectual Property
paragraphs: All intellectual property rights in and to the Application, including but not limited to source code, design, and functionality, are owned by the developer.
Any unauthorized reproduction, modification, distribution, or commercial use is strictly prohibited without prior written consent.

sections.title: 9. Amendments
paragraphs: The developer reserves the right to amend these Terms at any time. The latest version shall be made available within the Application and shall take effect upon publication.

sections.title: 10. Governing Law
paragraphs: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Bulgaria.
Any disputes arising from or in connection with these Terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the competent Bulgarian courts.

sections.title: 11. Contact
paragraphs: For inquiries related to the Application, the User may contact the developer via the contact details provided within the Application.

errors.invalidFileTypeHtml: Invalid file type. Expected .htm or .html file.
errors.invalidCsvFormat: Invalid file. Expected Activity Statement CSV from IBKR.
errors.invalidHtmlFormat: Invalid file. Expected Trade Confirmation HTML from IBKR.
errors.unsupportedCurrency: Unsupported currency: {{currency}}. Only USD and EUR are supported.

app.title: IBKR Tax Calculator
app.copyright: © 2026 IBKR Tax Calculator. All rights reserved.
app.csvHint: IBKR Portal → Reports → Statements → Activity (CSV format)
app.htmlHint: IBKR Portal → Reports → Statements → Trade Confirmation (HTML)

interest.title: Appendix No. 6 – Income from Other Sources (Art. 35)
interest.bodyPart1: Interest from IBKR is declared in
interest.bodyPart3: : "Total amount of income with code 606, payers of which are not enterprises or self-insured persons". In field
interest.bodyPart4: enter the total amount in {{localCurrencyLabel}} ({{localCurrencyCode}}), calculated by the BNB exchange rate applicable on the date of each payment.

csv.title: How to Download Activity Statement
steps: Log in to Interactive Brokers Client Portal
In the form, select desired period — "Annual"

htm.title: How to Download Trade Confirmation
steps: Log in to Interactive Brokers Client Portal
Go to Performance & Reports > Trade Confirmations
Click Run and after generation — Download

taxApp5.title: Appendix No. 5 – Table 2
taxApp5.subtitle: Income from transfer of financial assets (stocks, ETFs outside EU, etc.). Code – 508
taxApp5.totalProceeds: Total amount of sale prices on sale or exchange of financial assets ({{lcl}})
taxApp5.taxableBase: Tax base after recognized expenses 10% (Art. 33, Para. 3) ({{lcl}})
taxApp5.infoLine1: Tax is calculated under Art. 33, Para. 3:
taxApp5.infoLine2: . If losses exceed gains, tax is 0. Losses are
taxApp5.infoLine3: carried forward to subsequent years. Enter values from the table in the corresponding fields of Appendix No. 5, Table 2, Code 508.

taxApp13.title: Appendix No. 13 – Part II
taxApp13.subtitle: Non-taxable income from sale of ETF units on regulated markets in EU. Code – 508

taxApp8Holdings.tableTitle: Held shares and units as of 31 December
taxApp8Holdings.title: Appendix No. 8 – Part I Held shares and units in foreign companies as of 31.12
taxApp8Holdings.bodyLine1: all foreign shares and units held as of 31 December
taxApp8Holdings.bodyLine2: regardless of whether income was realized. They are entered in Appendix No. 8, Part I — one line per position. Data is based on open positions from IBKR at year-end.

tradeTableCols.securityIdHelp: Open the link, select the instrument, go to "Trading venues" and check if market type is "Regulated market"

dividendTableCols.grossAmountLcl: Gross income including paid tax (for code 8141 income)

spb8Warning.title: SPB-8 Report Filing Required (BNB Regulation No. 27)
spb8Warning.body: The total value of your open positions exceeds the EUR 25,000 threshold. Under BNB Regulation No. 27, you must file an Annual Report — SPB-8 form.
details: Deadline: by March 31 of the following year
Filing: electronically via BNB ISIS with qualified electronic signature (QES), by mail or in person at BNB office
SPB-8 is a statistical form for BNB — not a tax declaration for the Tax Agency
Must declare shares, bonds, ETFs, ETPs and cash in foreign accounts (incl. IBKR), acquired without intermediation of Bulgarian investment intermediary

taxApp8Dividends.title: Appendix No. 8 – Part III Dividends from Abroad
taxApp8Dividends.bodyLine2: on the gross amount. If the company withheld tax abroad, it is entered in column
taxApp8Dividends.bodyLine3: and is deducted from the due Bulgarian tax (
taxApp8Dividends.tableTitle: Tax due for dividends from abroad

priorYearForm.title: Prior year ({{prevYearLabel}}) positions — review and adjust if needed
priorYearForm.bodyLine1: Positions acquired before the current tax year have been detected. The acquisition cost in {{lcl}} was calculated using the BNB rate at end of {{prevYearLabel}} ({{prevYearEndDate}}{{rateInfo}}). You can adjust values according to the actual acquisition rate and date of last purchase, then click

etfClassificationWarning.title: The "taxable / non-taxable" status was automatically determined based on available data.
etfClassificationWarning.line2: In most cases the determination is correct – ETFs on regulated markets that are not crypto are marked as Exempt from tax, and all other instruments as Taxable.
etfClassificationWarning.line1: It is recommended to verify before submitting to the Tax Agency.

costBasisStrategy.label: Acquisition cost method
costBasisStrategy.defaultWarning: You don't need to change this setting unless you know what you're doing.
costBasisStrategy.ibkrDesc: Uses "Basis" column from CSV file as documentation for specific closed lots. The cost in local currency is entered in the table above.
costBasisStrategy.weightedAverageDesc: Backup method under Bulgarian law when you cannot prove which specific lot was sold (Art. 33, Para. 4).

priorYearWarning.title: Approximate acquisition cost in {{lcl}} — prior year positions
priorYearWarning.bodyLine1: For the trades listed below, no purchase data was found in the current reporting year. The acquisition cost in {{lcl}} was calculated using the BNB rate at end of {{prevYearLabel}} ({{prevYearEndDate}}{{rateInfo}}). The actual value may differ if shares were acquired at a different rate within {{prevYearLabel}}. We recommend checking the exact acquisition rate in your trading history and adjusting the value manually if needed.

sections.title: 1. General Provisions
paragraphs: This privacy policy describes how information is processed when using this website.

sections.title: 2. Data Collected
paragraphs: This website does not collect personal data that could identify users.

sections.title: 3. File Processing
paragraphs: Files uploaded by users are processed entirely locally in the browser and are not sent to any server. The site has no access to the contents of these files.

sections.title: 4. Local Storage
paragraphs: The site uses local storage in the user's browser only to save selected display settings (light or dark mode, and language).
list: Stored information does not contain personal data
Data remains entirely on the user's device
Data is not shared with third parties
Data is used only to improve user experience

sections.title: 5. Cookies
paragraphs: The site does not use cookies for tracking, analytics, or marketing purposes.

sections.title: 6. Third Parties
paragraphs: The site does not share information with third parties and does not use external tracking services.

sections.title: 7. Security
paragraphs: Reasonable technical and organizational measures have been taken to protect the site and data.

sections.title: 8. User Rights
paragraphs: Since no personal data is collected, no processing is performed that would be subject to GDPR rights.

sections.title: 9. Policy Changes
paragraphs: This policy may be updated as needed. Changes take effect upon publication on the site.

sections.title: 10. Contact
paragraphs: For questions about this policy, you can contact via the site's GitHub profile.
